name: Underlord
description: Nothing can stop us. Nothing can slow our march. And when we have arrived, all will burn.

abilities.name: Invading Force
abilities.description: Grants his allied heroes movement speed bonus and incoming damage reduction once their teleportation completes. Damage Reduction: 4%/6%/8%/10% (9%/11%/13%/15%). Duration: 5. Effect Radius: Global.

abilities.name: Abyssal Horde
abilities.description: The Fiend's Gate additionally summons uncontrollable demonic minions on the portal that Underlord teleports to. The summoned warriors and archers deal less damage to structures. Enemy Search Radius: 1200. Spawn Interval: 2. Max Duration: 16.5. Damage Factor: 0.5.

abilities.name: Firestorm
abilities.description: Applies a debuff per interval that deals additional damage over time corresponding to the debuff-affected units' max health. However, other ability effects still apply. Cast Range: 675. Effect Radius: 425. Number of Instances: 6 (9). Instance Interval: 1 (0.75). Damage per Instance: 30/50/70/90. Burn Interval: 1 (0.75). Cooldown: 16/15/14/13 (11/10/9/8). Mana Cost: 110/125/140/155.

abilities.name: Pit of Malice
abilities.description: Increases effect radius. Cast Range: 675. Effect Radius: 400 (500). Damage: 20/30/40/50. Root Interval: 3.6. Root Duration: 1.5/1.6/1.7/1.8 (1.9/2/2.1/2.2). Pit Duration: 12. Cooldown: 30/25/20/15. Mana Cost: 110/120/130/140.

abilities.name: Atrophy Aura
abilities.description: The bonus attack damage granted is less effective per creep death. Radius: 900. Attack Damage Reduction: 6%/14%/22%/30% (16%/24%/32%/40%). Attack Damage Bonus per Enemy Hero: 30/35/40/45. Buff Duration: 30/40/50/60 (45/55/65/75). Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Attack Damage Bonus per Enemy Creep: 2/4/6/8.

abilities.name: Fiend's Gate
abilities.description: Opens one portal next to Underlord and another portal in the target location. Both portals have to be at least a certain distance away from each other. Heroes can channel a portal to teleport to the other side. Gate Min Distance: 1500. Duration: 20. Fountain to Gate Distance: 1425. Effect Radius: 700. Cooldown: 110/105/100 (100/95/90). Mana Cost: 175.
